Issues: Model Release Required: The two women featured are identifiable models. To sell this commercially, explicit written releases from both subjects are mandatory.
Location Release Required: The specific cafe/building facade is visible. A location release agreement must be obtained from the property owner or managing entity.

Branding/Trademark Issue: The prominent signage ('LOIRÉ') establishes specific intellectual property. Using this name or visual branding requires explicit permission from the property owners or trademark holders. This drastically reduces its universal sellability unless sold specifically for a non-commercial concept.
Casting/Model Consistency: If the goal is to sell this as a lifestyle shot, the model releases must cover the duration and scope of usage (e.g., print ads, website headers, etc.).
